name: Table
description: Table: renders tabular data with columns, headers, and optional zebra-striping

api.signature: new Table(columnsOrProps: TableColumn[] | TableProps, rows: TableRow[] = [], style: Partial<Style> = {}, options: TableOptions = {},)

props.name: state
props.description: External state object – if provided, Table syncs rows through it

props.name: onStateChange
props.description: Called whenever rows change via setRows
